description.en: 1-based position of one member in a repeated feature's list (string 1, string 2) — the stable join key a site and its derived config agree on.

Fixed part-instance id of a repeated electrical feature — the leg or line-pair a value/instance belongs to (a parts-map id: a, b, c, n, ab, bc, ca). Absent on a feature's combined aggregate; countable (non-fixed) instances join by `ordinal` instead.
